cases: renders all containers in the list
renders the container image name for each row
shows the correct status badge for each container
shows loading skeleton when isLoading is true
shows generic empty state when no containers and no active filter
shows filtered empty state when containers array is empty due to filter
filters containers by Running status pill
resets to all containers when All pill is clicked
selects all visible rows when the header checkbox is checked
deselects all rows when header checkbox is clicked again
shows bulk action buttons when rows are selected
calls stopContainer mutation when Stop is clicked in the action menu
calls deleteContainer mutation when Remove is clicked in the action menu
calls restartContainer mutation when Restart is clicked
shows a Logs link in the action menu
displays the correct container count in the footer
updates the footer count after filtering
starts with an unauthenticated, idle state
sets user, token, and isAuthenticated on successful login
sets error and isLoading=false on failed login
clears all auth state after logout
clears state even when the server logout request fails
updates the token in the store on successful refresh
deduplicates concurrent refresh calls — only one HTTP request is fired
calls logout when the refresh request fails
updates the user object in the store

key_design_decisions.token_storage: Access token stored in-memory only (Zustand state). Refresh token stored in httpOnly cookie set by the API server. Never written to localStorage.
key_design_decisions.sse_cleanup: EventSource instances are closed in useEffect cleanup to prevent memory leaks and duplicate connections on remount.
key_design_decisions.optimistic_delete: useDeleteContainer applies an optimistic cache update via onMutate, rolls back via onError, and invalidates on settle.
key_design_decisions.virtualisation: react-window FixedSizeList is used in ContainerTable for rows, enabling smooth rendering of 500+ containers.
key_design_decisions.refresh_dedup: A module-level promise variable (_refreshInFlight) ensures concurrent 401 retries share a single token refresh request.
key_design_decisions.accessibility: All interactive elements have aria-label, role, aria-expanded, aria-haspopup as appropriate. Status badges use role=status with aria-label.
